handoff_record.directive: NLT-HND-2026-004 — establish .toi as a real standard file type (foundation pour)
work_completed: Mandatory reconciliation pass: inventoried existing repo, diffed against canonical §4 schema, confirmed via git history (--diff-filter=A) that no prior TypeScript / RFC 8785 / Ed25519 / .toi code ever existed

Authored normative SPEC.md (RFC 2119 conformance language; file format, reserved $-namespace, content sections, forward-compat, tier precedence, RFC 8785 canonicalization, Ed25519 signatures, security/privacy)

Built @neurolift-technologies/toi TypeScript reference library driven by a single Zod schema (source of truth): types, parser/serializer, validator, RFC 8785 (JCS) canonicalizer, Ed25519 sign/verify, tier precedence resolver, error taxonomy, stable public API (index)
Generated JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) artifact from the Zod schema: schema/toi-1.0.0.schema.json
Conformance suite: 51 tests across 5 files, all passing — valid + invalid fixtures, RFC 8785 known-answer tests, deterministic Ed25519 known-answer vector (signed.toi)
Drafted Josh's personal .toi (test/fixtures/valid/josh-personal.toi) for his approval
Authored packages/toi/README.md (install, quick start, file format, API reference)
Deprecated legacy schemas/personal-toi.schema.json IN PLACE (marked deprecated, pointed to new standard; no properties removed, not deleted)
Extended packages/toi/package.json files array to ship SPEC.md and schema/
Created .vscode/settings.json mapping *.toi -> JSON + the JSON Schema (local-only; see blockers)
blockers: .vscode/ is gitignored (.gitignore:21) — the editor association will NOT ship to other clones unless a .gitignore exception (!.vscode/settings.json) is added. Surfaced as a decision; not changed unilaterally.

Package LICENSE files were skipped per Josh's explicit instruction this session — packages/toi/package.json declares "Apache-2.0" but no LICENSE text file is present in the package. Needs resolution before publish.

'Bump to v1.1.0' target is ambiguous — the @neurolift-technologies/toi package is a net-new initial release where 1.0.0 is semantically correct; the bump most likely applies to the external NLT-HND-2026-004 directive artifact (not in-repo). Confirm intended target.
decisions_made: Personal .toi: drafted by agent for Josh's approval (Josh)
Legacy schema handled by deprecate-in-place, never overwrite/delete (governance: do not silently overwrite)
Package version held at 1.0.0 — correct for a net-new initial release; not auto-bumped
decisions_pending: Root LICENSE MIT -> Apache-2.0 flip (Josh said he will do this later)
Resolve package LICENSE: add Apache-2.0 LICENSE text, or change the declared license (currently declared Apache-2.0 with no file)
Approve a .gitignore exception so the .toi editor association ships, or keep it local-only
Confirm what 'bump to v1.1.0' applies to (external directive artifact vs package)

reconciliation.summary: The directive presumed existing RFC 8785 / Ed25519 logic to preserve. Git history proves none ever existed — all canonicalization and signing is net-new. No silent overwrite occurred because there was nothing to overwrite. Non-canonical prior shapes (GHCPT bundle, VibeSDK free-text TOIProfile, legacy personal-toi schema) were NOT merged — single source of truth preserved.
kept: schemas/personal-toi.schema.json (retained, now annotated deprecated — not deleted)
Legacy Python framework, docs, nlt-otoi/, .nltotoi/ governance — untouched
Root LICENSE (MIT) — untouched (flip deferred to Josh)
changed: schemas/personal-toi.schema.json — added deprecated:true, $comment, updated title/description to point to the new standard; zero property removals
packages/toi/package.json — files array extended with SPEC.md and schema/

handoff_record.next_agent_notes: The Zod schema (packages/toi/src/schema.ts) is the single source of truth; the JSON Schema artifact is generated from it via `npm run build:schema`. Do NOT hand-edit schema/toi-1.0.0.schema.json. The .toi format version ($toi) and the npm package version are independent: the format is 1.0.0 (the standard), the package is 1.0.0 (the impl). signed.toi is a deterministic Ed25519 KAT (fixed non-secret seed) — treat it as a cross-implementation conformance vector; its public_key is ebVWLo_mVPlAeLES6KmLp5AfhTrmlb7X4OORC60ElmQ. The custom field is the ONLY place non-schema content is permitted; multi-agent/orchestration content belongs in the .otoi layer (nlt-otoi), which is a SEPARATE pour gated on Josh's sign-off — do not auto-proceed.
files_modified: packages/toi/** (added — entire reference library, spec, readme, tests, fixtures, schema, scripts, manifest)
tests_run: npm run build (tsc emit with declarations)
npm run build:schema (regenerate JSON Schema artifact)
